summary: Created LPVaultFactory with constructor that initializes the Auth registry (admin, oracle, operator) and stores immutable external contract addresses (implementation, usdc, exchange, conditionalTokens). Role separation enforced at constructor time (oracle != operator). Created LPVault with _disableInitializers() in constructor preventing direct initialization of the implementation. Both contracts export the Auth modifiers (onlyAdmin, onlyOperator, onlyOracle, onlyFactory) for downstream slices. Coverage: Factory 100%, Vault 83.33%.
